message:
fix(algorithms): return Result from max flow functions instead of silently returning zero

Change max_flow_edmonds_karp, max_flow_edmonds_karp_directed, and
compute_max_flow_residual to return Result<_, FlowError> instead of
silently returning a zero-flow result when source or sink nodes are
not found in the graph. This matches NetworkX's behavior of raising
nx.NodeNotFound for missing nodes.

Add FlowError enum with NodeNotFound variant implementing Display
and std::error::Error. The source==sink case still returns Ok with
zero flow, which is mathematically correct.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
